resuméText:
Achille Niyonshuti 
Junior Frontend Developer 
Kigali, Rwanda  ·  achille010@github  ·  achille@email.com 
Languages 
Kinyarwanda (Native)  ·  English 
(Fluent)  ·  French (Intermediate) 
Soft Skills 
Public Speaking  ·  Technical 
Presentations  ·  Team Collaboration  
·  Problem Solving 
 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 
 
Passionate Junior Frontend Developer with hands-on experience in modern web technologies across multiple 
programming paradigms and languages. Currently pursuing a TVET Certificate III in Web Development under 
the Rwanda TVET Board, with a strong academic foundation in software development and user interface 
engineering. Recognized for clear technical communication, confident presentation skills, and the ability to 
articulate complex concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences. 
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
 
Frontend Languages & Frameworks 
HTML5  ·  CSS3  ·  JavaScript (ES6+)  ·  TypeScript  ·  React.js  ·  Next.js  ·  Tailwind CSS 
 
Other Languages & Tools 
Python  ·  PHP  ·  C / C++  ·  Node.js  ·  Express.js  ·  Redux / RTK 
 
Design & Dev Tools 
Krita  ·  Photoshop  ·  Photopea  ·  Canva  ·  Git & GitHub  ·  VS Code  ·  Figma 
EDUCATION 
 
TVET Certificate III — Web Development 
Rwanda TVET Board  ·  2024 – Present 
• Core curriculum covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Node.js, Express REST APIs, MongoDB and 
Mongoose — a comprehensive multi-language software development pathway. 
• Studied Web UI Development including web ergonomics, accessibility standards, and multi-page project 
delivery aligned to Ministry of ICT specifications. 
• Studied Web Application Development covering full JavaScript fundamentals, server-side development, 
database integration, and API design. 
EXPERIENCE 
 
Frontend Developer (Hackathon)  |  Umurava AI Hackathon  —  April 2026 
• Led frontend architecture and scaffolded the full monorepo codebase (Next.js + Node.js + TypeScript) for a 5-
person team. 
• Designed the recruiter-facing dashboard UI including job management, applicant ingestion, and AI shortlist 
visualization. 
• Integrated Redux Toolkit for state management across auth, jobs, applicants, and screening result slices. 
• Presented technical architecture decisions to teammates clearly, enabling parallel backend and AI 
development. 

Full Stack Developer (Personal Projects)  |  Independent  —  2023 – Present 
• Built a calculator REST API using Node.js/Express with ESM module architecture, MVC structure, and a 60-
test Jest suite. 
• Developed a Fast.com speed test replica in React using FontAwesome icons and custom animation logic. 
• Maintained clean Git histories including branching strategies, backdated commits, and multi-repo 
management. 
• Consistently used TypeScript across projects for type safety in both frontend and backend codebases. 
NOTABLE PROJECTS 
 
Umurava AI Talent Screener  —  Next.js · Node.js · TypeScript · Gemini API · MongoDB · Redux 
AI-powered recruiter dashboard that screens and ranks job applicants using Google Gemini. Features structured 
profile ingestion, resume parsing, weighted scoring, and natural-language candidate reasoning output. 
Calculator API  —  Node.js · Express · TypeScript · Jest · ESM 
Production-grade REST API with full MVC architecture, floating-point precision handling, and a comprehensive 60-
test Jest suite covering edge cases and error boundaries. 
Speed Test Replica  —  React · JavaScript · FontAwesome · CSS Animations 
A faithful Fast.com replica featuring animated download/upload measurement UI, icon-based rendering, and 
responsive layout — built entirely in React with no UI libraries. 
PRESENTATIONS & COMMUNICATION 
 
• Fluent English speaker with demonstrated ability to explain and document technical architecture to 
diverse audiences. 
• Experienced in writing clear technical documentation including README files, architecture diagrams, 
API documentation, and codebase onboarding guides. 
• Participated in team-based hackathon environments requiring daily async communication, task 
delegation, and progress presentations. 
• Regularly writes contest application statements and professional profiles that clearly and confidently 
articulate technical and personal strengths.
